diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -1,33 +1,26 @@
 import argparse, os, json, numpy as np

+p=argparse.ArgumentParser()

+p.add_argument('--data_path',required=True)

+p.add_argument('--checkpoint',required=True)

+p.add_argument('--output',required=True)

+args=p.parse_args()

 

-SEQ_LEN=96; PRED_LEN=720; N_FEAT=7

+ckpt_dir=os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint) if os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint) else 'checkpoints'

+mean=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'mean.npy'))

+std=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'std.npy'))

+W=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'ridge_perch_tv.npy'))  # [C, 96, 720]

 

-def main():

-    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()

-    ap.add_argument('--data_path', required=True)

-    ap.add_argument('--checkpoint', required=True)

-    ap.add_argument('--output', required=True)

-    args = ap.parse_args()

-    ckpt_dir = os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint)

-    mean = np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'mean.npy'))

-    std = np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'std.npy'))

-    # checkpoint is the .npy of weights [C,L,P]

-    W = np.load(args.checkpoint)  # [C,L,P]

-    x = np.load(os.path.join(args.data_path,'test_windows.npy')).astype(np.float32)

-    # normalize

-    xn = (x - mean)/std  # [N,L,C]

-    last = xn[:, -1:, :]  # [N,1,C]

-    xnr = xn - last  # [N,L,C]

-    # predict per channel

-    preds = np.zeros((x.shape[0], PRED_LEN, N_FEAT), dtype=np.float32)

-    for c in range(N_FEAT):

-        Xc = xnr[:,:,c]  # [N,L]

-        Pc = Xc @ W[c]  # [N,P]

-        preds[:,:,c] = Pc + last[:,0,c:c+1]

-    # un-normalize

-    preds = preds * std + mean

-    with open(args.output,'w') as f:

-        json.dump({'predictions': preds.tolist()}, f)

-

-if __name__ == '__main__':

-    main()

+X=np.load(os.path.join(args.data_path,'test_windows.npy')).astype(np.float32)

+N=X.shape[0]

+Xn=(X-mean)/std

+last=Xn[:,-1:,:]

+Xc=Xn-last  # [N,96,7]

+P=np.zeros((N,720,7),dtype=np.float32)

+for c in range(7):

+    P[:,:,c]=Xc[:,:,c].astype(np.float64)@W[c]

+P=P+last  # add back last value

+P=P*std+mean  # denormalize

+out={'predictions':P.tolist()}

+with open(args.output,'w') as f:

+    json.dump(out,f)

+print('wrote',args.output)
